states.description: Main screen showing list of SMS conversations
visual_cues: list of conversations with contact + last message + time
Start a conversation button when empty
resource_hints: No stored conversations have been found

states.description: Open chat thread with a specific contact/number

visual_cues: No contacts found or SUGGESTIONS list

states.description: Context action bar after long-press on a message bubble
Context action bar after long-press on a conversation in the list
Overflow menu inside an open thread
Confirmation dialog for deleting a message
visual_cues: Are you sure you want to delete 1 message?
resource_hints: Are you sure you want to delete

states.description: Text-field context popover with Paste option
visual_cues: Paste button appearing above input field

transitions.action: input recipient then click(confirm_check) or select suggestion
click(Copy to clipboard) or click(Done) or navigate_back

strategies.name: REPLY_TO_CONTACT
strategies.preconditions: home_screen or conversation_list; target conversation exists
steps: On conversation_list, locate conversation for target number/contact (scroll if needed)
verify message bubble appears in thread, then mark complete
strategies.success_signal: The typed reply is visible as an outgoing message bubble in the thread
strategies.fallback: If conversation not visible, use search or scroll; if wrong conversation, navigate_back to list

strategies.name: REPLY_MOST_RECENT
strategies.preconditions: home_screen; at least one conversation exists
steps: On conversation_list, click the top-most (most recent) conversation row
confirm outgoing bubble and mark complete
strategies.success_signal: Reply bubble appears under the most recent thread
strategies.fallback: If ordering unclear, use the first visible row which is chronologically newest

strategies.name: SEND_NEW_MESSAGE
steps: click('Start a conversation') or the new-conversation button
click(confirm check mark) to accept the number
strategies.success_signal: Thread opens with recipient header and outgoing message bubble visible
strategies.fallback: If check mark missing, tap a matching suggestion row to open the thread

strategies.name: SEND_CLIPBOARD_CONTENT
strategies.preconditions: home_screen; clipboard already contains desired text
steps: click recipient field, input_text(phone number), click confirm check
In thread, long_press the Type a message… field
strategies.success_signal: Outgoing bubble with exact clipboard text visible in thread
strategies.fallback: If paste popover not shown, tap input first then long_press again; avoid pasting into the recipient field

dead_ends.note: App has no Resend action; long-press menu only offers Copy/Share/Delete; overflow offers Block/Archive/etc. Must manually re-type or paste text and send again.
Options (Block number, Archive, Copy number, Mark Unread, Pin, Select all) do not include Resend.

dead_ends.failed_action: reply to most recent while wrong conversation targeted
dead_ends.note: Agent sometimes picks a non-top row thinking it is most recent; the top row is newest.

dead_ends.failed_action: long_press input after typing recipient to paste
dead_ends.note: Paste appended clipboard text onto the recipient field instead of the message body, resulting in an invalid recipient and failed send.

dead_ends.failed_action: reply in the wrong thread (sender's thread) instead of starting new thread to third-party recipient
dead_ends.note: For 'forward address to <other contact>', agent pasted address back into the originating sender's thread instead of opening a new conversation with the target contact.

dead_ends.failed_action: repeatedly tap 'Add Person' thinking it starts a new chat
dead_ends.note: 'Add Person' inside an open thread is interpreted as add-to-existing; combined with a lingering selection it can open a delete dialog loop.

categories.name: REPLY_TO_ENTITY
categories.precondition: Application open to a list of existing conversations/entities; target entity identifiable by name or identifier
abstract_steps: Launch the application
Locate the target entity row in the list (scrolling or using a lookup affordance if needed)
Open the entity detail/thread
Focus the reply/compose input
Enter the requested text
Trigger the send/submit control
Verify the new entry appears attributed to the user
failure_modes: Selecting wrong entity when multiple similar names exist
Typing into the header/recipient field instead of the body
Forgetting to press send after entering text
verification_checklist: Sent content string matches exactly (including punctuation)
New outgoing item visible in the correct thread
Input field is cleared after submission with zero residual draft content

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application allows creating a new item; optionally requires a target identifier (e.g., a recipient or reference value) and content
abstract_steps: Launch the application
Invoke the create-new action (empty-state CTA or new-item button)
Provide required identifier in the dedicated field
Confirm identifier (if a confirm control exists) before entering body
Enter body content in the dedicated body field
Submit
Verify the new item is persisted
failure_modes: A required interface element is unavailable or cannot be located, rendering the action infeasible
Content accidentally placed in identifier field
Skipping confirm step so body field never activates
verification_checklist: Identifier correctly attached to the new item
Item appears in the main list after creation

categories.name: TRANSFER_CONTENT_BETWEEN_ENTITIES
categories.precondition: Source item contains text to forward; target entity might already have an existing thread/record or might require creating one
abstract_steps: Open source item and select the desired text (long-press)
Copy text to clipboard via the selection action bar
Navigate back to the list of entities
Open or create the target entity's thread/record, ensuring it is distinct from the source thread
Focus the body input and insert the clipboard contents via the standard insertion gesture
Submit
Verify the transferred text appears attributed to the user within the target thread
failure_modes: Sending the content back into the source thread instead of the target
Pasting into an identifier field, corrupting the recipient
Clipboard ends up empty because the copy action was never confirmed
verification_checklist: Inserted text exactly equals the original
Outgoing item is visible within the target entity's thread rather than the source's

categories.name: REPEAT_PREVIOUS_ACTION
categories.precondition: A prior item/action exists and user wants to repeat it
abstract_steps: Open the item/thread containing the original
Look for an explicit repeat/resend affordance in context menu or overflow
If absent, capture original text (read or copy)
Re-enter the text via the standard create path and submit it once more
failure_modes: Assuming a dedicated repeat control exists when the interface lacks one
Declaring task infeasible without trying the manual re-entry workaround
Repeating from the wrong item (e.g., a received vs sent one)
verification_checklist: A second outgoing copy of the identical text exists
Timestamp of new copy is after the original
Original item remains intact and has been preserved without accidental removal

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_APP
categories.precondition: A different application or the device's primary launcher surface is currently in the foreground
abstract_steps: Attempt direct app launch by name
If unavailable, open the application list and locate it via scrolling or a lookup affordance
If truly absent, surface an infeasibility status
failure_modes: Confusing a visually-similar app for the target
Prematurely reporting infeasibility before trying the application list
verification_checklist: Foreground window belongs to the intended app
A recognizable landing screen of that app is visible
